# ---- Large / regenerable data (obtain via DATA.md or Zenodo) ----
# CRyPTIC variant tables (regenerated by the ingest pipeline)
data/vcf/variants.csv
data/vcf_indel/variants.csv
# built analytical database (regenerated from the pipeline)
data/*.duckdb
# raw reads and TB-Profiler outputs (regenerated from public FASTQ)
reads/
results_*/
*.fastq
*.fastq.gz
*.bam
*.bai
*.cram
# trained models are large and shipped via Zenodo, not Git
models/
# (GenTB models are tiny -> keep them in the repo)
!models_gentb_pza/
!models_gentb_str/

# ---- Python ----
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*.egg-info/
.ipynb_checkpoints/
.venv/
venv/
env/

# ---- OS / editor ----
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
.vscode/
.idea/

data/*_supp/*.zip
